name: Casa de la Luna
description: A low-light desert cabin plan for guests who want night air, quiet mornings, and practical comfort near the field base.
shortDescription: Solar-backed desert cabin with private bath and direct dark-sky orientation.

photos.alt: Concept card for Casa de la Luna under a dark desert sky

policies.cancellation: Full refund with 14 days notice; weather exceptions handled manually.
policies.smoking: No smoking indoors or near dry grass zones.
policies.access: Remote roads require careful arrival planning before sunset.
policies.weather: Heat, wind, and dust are normal realities; pack accordingly.
